request_text: Track each order from placement to delivery
Let shoppers hunt for products by typing a few letters
rationale: Hunting products by typed letters = product search, Clause 2.3.

request_text: A basket that remembers a shopper's picks between visits
rationale: The remembering basket = shopping cart management, Clause 2.1.
Cryptocurrency payment is excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: List our inventory on other companies' storefronts too
rationale: Selling via other storefronts = third-party marketplace integration, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: A catalog section for marketplace partners' goods
rationale: Catalog vocabulary (2.3), but requires marketplace seller integration — excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: A wishlist that emails shoppers when prices drop
rationale: No clause covers wishlists or email campaigns — change request.
No clause covers delivery scheduling — change request.
Clause 2.2 caps payment provider integrations at 3 — change request.

request_text: Bring on one more card payment provider
rationale: Within the 3-provider limit (2.2) but the 30h payment pool is exhausted (37h logged) — change request.

request_text: Checkout fails with a server error when the cart has a discount
rationale: Defect in delivered cart/checkout — bug-fix maintenance under Clause 7.1.
A single word names no deliverable — the PMO must clarify.
